creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Hi

At a glance (I did not check the entire page), two of the dates under  <https://www.freebsd.org/projects/summerofcode/#faq> might be wrong: 

25 June

29 June

Please compare with <https://developers.google.com/open-source/gsoc/timeline>: 

July 25

July 29
